title: KnowledgeEntry
description: A structured sovereign knowledge record. Captures knowledge from any tradition with full provenance, confidence, and contestation linkage. Core artifact of Layer 2 (Sovereign Knowledge Mode).

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this knowledge entry

title.description: Short descriptive title for this knowledge entry

summary.description: Plain language summary of what this entry captures

content.description: Full content of the knowledge entry

knowledge_system.description: The epistemic or cultural tradition this entry belongs to (e.g., 'Ifá tradition', 'Western empirical science', 'Nsibidi script system', 'Oral history — Yoruba')

source_ref.description: Citation, reference, or attribution for this entry

confidence.description: Epistemic confidence level of this entry

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this entry

entered_by.description: Actor or agent who created this entry

entry_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this entry was created

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent formal review

reviewed_by.description: Actor who last reviewed this entry

linked_claims.description: IDs of claim records derived from or related to this entry

linked_contestations.description: IDs of contestation records against this entry or its linked claims

tags.description: Optional tags for search and categorisation
